user.title: Add a Storm Risk location
user.description: Storm Risk polls the free Open-Meteo API for convective forecast data. Enter a name and the coordinates to monitor. Add the integration again to track additional locations.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this location (e.g. Home, Work).

abort.already_configured: A Storm Risk location with these coordinates already exists.

init.title: Storm Risk scoring
init.description: Tune the composite score. Each ingredient contributes up to 33 points. Lower divisors and a higher dew-point multiplier make the score more sensitive. Thresholds set the boundaries between the interpretation bands and must increase from low to high.

data_description.threshold_low: At or above this, the level becomes 'present'. Default 25.
data_description.threshold_medium: At or above this, the level becomes 'meaningful'. Default 50.
data_description.threshold_high: At or above this, the level becomes 'loaded'. Default 75.

error.thresholds_not_ascending: Thresholds must increase: low < medium < high.
